name: Oatmeal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, process the dry ingredients (oat flakes, whole wheat flour, and baking powder) until finely combined. Transfer to a medium bowl.
2. Mix the liquid ingredients (skim milk and egg whites) lightly in a small bowl.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and stir only until the dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Let stand for 5 minutes.
5. Preheat the griddle.
6. Bake on the hot griddle, turning with a spatula when the edges firm up.
7. Makes 10 medium pancakes.
